security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://api.minecraftservices.com https://api.modrinth.com https://api.curseforge.com https://piston-meta.mojang.com https://launchermeta.mojang.com https://resources.download.minecraft.net https://libraries.minecraft.net https://meta.fabricmc.net https://maven.minecraftforge.net https://maven.neoforged.net; img-src 'self' data: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; script-src 'self'; worker-src 'self' blob:

bundle.shortDescription: A safe, polished, customizable Minecraft launcher
bundle.longDescription: Lumen is a safe, polished, customizable Minecraft launcher built for smooth profile management, loader compatibility, Java runtime validation, and a clean desktop experience.
